message:
chore: update snapshots and conformance tests from concurrent agents

Updates 7 TUI snapshots for insights/actionable rendering changes and
adds 1 new conformance test (79 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
